subject: A flowing blue cloak or mantle bursting outward in a radiant explosion of sparks and starlight, suggesting the moment of being donned or activated by an unseen wearer
description: The art shows a billowing blue cloak or mantle in mid-motion, its fabric swirling outward in dynamic, ribbon-like folds. The garment is haloed by an explosive burst of bright white sparks and motes of light radiating outward like a starburst. No wearer is visible — the mantle appears empty or its occupant is implied rather than shown. The palette is dominated by deep cobalt and royal blues for the cloth, set against a softer azure background, with brilliant white-yellow highlights at the center of the spark burst. The composition is energetic and centered, reading as a magical investiture or activation moment.
foreground: swirling blue cloak/mantle with starburst of sparks at center
background: soft hazy blue field with faint glow
emotion: no figure visible; the mantle itself reads as charged, dynamic, awakening
